umich.notes: lsa.umich.edu returns 403/ECONNREFUSED from proxy. URLs tried: lsa.umich.edu/cg/, ro.umich.edu/catalogs, atlas.ai.umich.edu, bulletin.umich.edu

duke.notes: SSL blocked from proxy environment. registrar.duke.edu/academics/courses-curricula-catalogs/ returns 404.

upenn.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped (11,142 deduplicated courses). Historical 2000-2025 not collected.

ucla.notes: registrar.ucla.edu/Academics/Course-Descriptions uses dynamic JS — not scrapable with requests.

uw.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. UW old-style HTML (anchor-name pattern).

osu.notes: catalog.osu.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

cmu.notes: catalog.cmu.edu SSL blocked. coursecatalog.web.cmu.edu also blocked. enr-apps.as.cmu.edu/assets/SOC/ has titles only (no descriptions).

usc.notes: catalogue.usc.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

brown.notes: cab.brown.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

dartmouth.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped via SmartCatalogIQ JSON nav + individual course pages (ThreadPoolExecutor 8 workers).

rice.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 105 subjects via Banner SWKSCAT course catalog. div.course with h3+Long Title+Description format.

emory.notes: catalog.emory.edu uses Coursedog (dynamic JS). emory.smartcatalogiq.com returns 404.

washu.notes: catalog.wustl.edu returns 403. bulletin.wustl.edu/courses/ returns 404. Course search only — dynamic.

ucsd.notes: catalog.ucsd.edu uses dynamic JS — not scrapable with requests.

ucdavis.notes: catalog.ucdavis.edu uses dynamic JS — not scrapable with requests.

ucsb.notes: app.coursedog.com backend — dynamic API, not directly scrapable.

uci.notes: catalogue.uci.edu uses dynamic JS — not scrapable with requests.

msu.notes: catalog.msu.edu and schedule.msu.edu return ProxyError (SSL blocked from proxy environment).

purdue.notes: catalog.purdue.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

iu.notes: bulletin.indiana.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

umn.notes: catalog.umn.edu and coursecat.umn.edu use Coursedog (dynamic JS, ProxyError). catalogs.umn.edu/courses returns 404.

uva.notes: records.ureg.virginia.edu uses Acalog (returns 202 for course content pages). louslist.org returns 403.

cwru.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 223 departments via bulletin.case.edu (full catalog — Engineering, Arts & Sciences, Medicine, Law, Management). Previous 'partial_accessible' assessment was outdated; all schools accessible. 0 depts failed.

wfu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 78 dept links. bulletin.wfu.edu (not catalog.wfu.edu which was SSL blocked). Standard CourseleafCMS courseblocktitle format.

uga.notes: bulletin.uga.edu is a JS SPA (React/MVC). Course/Index has 249 subjects in a select dropdown but all content is dynamically loaded.

fsu.notes: catalog.fsu.edu and apps.registrar.fsu.edu return ProxyError (SSL blocked from proxy environment).

uarizona.notes: catalog.arizona.edu uses dynamic JS — not scrapable with requests.

asu.notes: catalog.asu.edu uses dynamic JS — not scrapable with requests.

utah.notes: catalog.utah.edu uses dynamic JS — not scrapable with requests.

vt.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 142 departments at catalog.vt.edu/course-descriptions/{dept}/. CourseleafCMS detail-code/detail-title format. Previously logged as Acalog but catalog has migrated to CourseleafCMS. Session warmup required (visit main page first).

pitt.notes: catalog.pitt.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

temple.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 248 departments. Previously logged as SSL-blocked but bulletin.temple.edu accessible. CourseleafCMS p.courseblocktitle + div.courseblockdesc format.

utk.notes: catalog.utk.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

uky.notes: catalog.uky.edu returns ProxyError (SSL blocked from proxy environment).

ua.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 107 course pages via /azindex/. Custom div.cb_subj/cb_numb/cb_title/cb_desc structure.

auburn.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 161 dept links, 4 failed. bulletin.auburn.edu (not catalog.auburn.edu which was Canvas LMS). Unique format: div.courseblock > p > strong with DEPT NUM TITLE (CREDITS) format.

lsu.notes: catalog.lsu.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

ou.notes: catalog.ou.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

unl.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Re-scraped with cb_ span format parser (undergrad + grad-professional). 9954 unique courses.

ku.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 17 college pages. CourseleafCMS with span.detail-code/detail-title/courseblockextra format.

msstate.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Custom em>strong title format 'DEPT NUM  Title:  N hours.'

unm.notes: catalog.unm.edu course paths return 404. Dynamic JS catalog.

idaho.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 135 departments. CourseleafCMS noindent variant. 1 dept failed.

utd.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 80 grad + 107 undergrad depts. Bukku system: p#{dept}{num} with span.course_address/title/hours.

txstate.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 124 depts via /azindex/. CourseleafCMS format. 1 dept failed.

uncg.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 115 depts. CourseleafCMS noindent variant.

calpoly.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 128 depts. Custom multi-line strong format. 3 depts failed.

utahtech.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. CourseleafCMS period format. 2 depts failed (biol, chem).

uvu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 148 depts. ODU-style div.cols.noindent format. 3 depts failed.

uaf.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 134 depts. Custom format: dept+num+title+credits concatenated in courseblocktitle.

umt.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 150 depts. CourseleafCMS dash format: DEPT NUM - Title. N Credits.

ysu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 154 depts. CourseleafCMS: DEPT NUM    Title    N s.h. format.

uwec.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 165 depts. CourseleafCMS: DEPT NUM Title (N crs) + p.courseblockdescription. 2 depts failed.

atu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 255 depts. CourseleafCMS span.detail-code + span.detail-title format. 1 dept failed.

unk.notes: UNK uses /undergraduate/ and /graduate/ URL patterns. Em dash separator in titles.

uwm.notes: UWM uses button.courseblocktitle format (not p), standard CourseleafCMS otherwise.

neiu.notes: NEIU uses dash-format codes (ACTG-201). Standard CourseleafCMS.

uidaho.notes: U Idaho: noindent format with optional (s) qualifier. Standard CourseleafCMS.

vsu.notes: Virginia State U, uses undergrad+grad paths, period-separator format.

worcester.notes: Worcester State U, full-name slug URLs, dash-format course codes (BI-101).

une.notes: U New England, div.cols.noindent format with div.courseblockextra desc.

uni.notes: U Northern Iowa: period separator with em-dash before credit hours.

iit.notes: Illinois Institute of Technology. div.courseblocktitle format (div not p).

fairfield.notes: Fairfield University. div.cols.noindent with span.detail-code/detail-title format.

wsu.notes: catalog.wsu.edu uses Blazor WebAssembly (.NET) - dynamic JS SPA, not scrapable.

oit.notes: catalog.oit.edu uses Coursedog - dynamic JS, not scrapable.

alverno.notes: Alverno College. Dash-format codes (A-100 Title). CourseleafCMS noindent variant.

vanguard.notes: Vanguard University. detail-code/detail-title span format. Dash-format codes (ACCT-P225).

biola.notes: Biola University. p.courseblocktitle with DEPT NBSP NUM - Title Credits N format.
